headline: Here's Why You Should Add NI Stock to Your Portfolio Right Now
summary: NiSource is investing billions in grid upgrades and cleaner energy while expanding gas and battery capacity to meet rising power demand and strengthen reliability.

headline: Entergy announces $5B in customer savings delivered by data center agreements; issues "Fair Share Plus" pledge
summary: Entergy today announced approximately $5 billion in total savings for 2.3 million customers in Arkansas, Louisiana and Mississippi because of data center customer agreements in those states. This announcement comes nearly two years since the company completed its first agreement in Mississippi in 2024 and just weeks after action on its latest agreement in Arkansas in December. The customer savings are projected over the next 20 years and come after the regulatory approval or acknowledgement of t

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Entergy, Raises Price Target to $107
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Nicholas Amicucci   maintains Entergy (NYSE:ETR) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $101 to $107.
